header.description: 当 MailerLite 事件发生时启动工作流

campaign.sent.description: 当营销活动发送时触发

subscriber.added_through_webform.description: 当通过表单添加订阅者时触发

subscriber.add_to_group.description: 当订阅者被添加到群组时触发

subscriber.automation_complete.description: 当订阅者完成自动化时触发

subscriber.automation_triggered.description: 当订阅者启动自动化时触发

subscriber.bounced.description: 当电子邮件地址发生退回时触发

subscriber.complaint.description: 当订阅者将营销活动标记为垃圾邮件时触发

subscriber.create.description: 当新订阅者被添加到账户时触发

subscriber.remove_from_group.description: 当订阅者从群组中移除时触发

subscriber.unsubscribe.description: 当订阅者取消订阅时触发

subscriber.update.description: 当订阅者的任何自定义字段被更新时触发
